description: EVEZ-OS Ring Communication Protocol Library. Emit script_id + drill_id + minimal evidence quote only. Bus stays lean.

steps: 1_frame_declaration: 'I'm speaking from Ring X mode: my evidence standard is ___.'
2_translate_bid: 'I think you're asking for ___ (not just saying ___).'
3_dual_validity: 'In your frame, truth means ___. In mine, truth means ___.'
5_joint_protocol: 'Let's run a reversible test / charter / constraint experiment by ___.'
6_stop_rule: 'If we can't agree on evidence, we agree on next action + review date.'

communication_matrix_8x8.note: Format: Opener + Evidence standard + Ask + Stop rule. Indexed as from_ring -> to_ring.
communication_matrix_8x8.R1_R1: I need X now. Help me do Y in the next 10 minutes. If not possible, smallest safe step?
communication_matrix_8x8.R1_R2: I'm unsafe. Give me one protective action/ritual that doesn't require belief. If it doesn't help in 10 min, we stop.
communication_matrix_8x8.R1_R3: I need protection/support. Tell me the rule/role: who does what right now. If unclear, assign one action each.
communication_matrix_8x8.R1_R4: I need a minimal plan. One variable to change, one measurement, one next action. Review in 30 minutes.
communication_matrix_8x8.R1_R5: I need care and containment. One thing that reduces harm immediately. Check back in 30 minutes.
communication_matrix_8x8.R1_R6: I need a constraint protocol. What's the fastest safe stabilization loop? Decide and revisit in 1 hour.
communication_matrix_8x8.R1_R7: I need grounding. Give me one stabilizing practice that reconnects me to body/environment. If it worsens, stop.
communication_matrix_8x8.R1_R8: I need one clean action now, no philosophy. Commit for 1 hour, then reassess.
communication_matrix_8x8.R2_R1: This feels dangerous/charged. Do one safety action first; we interpret later. If safe improves, continue.
communication_matrix_8x8.R2_R2: Here's the sign and the rule I think it implies. What would count as 'not a sign'? If none, park it.
communication_matrix_8x8.R2_R3: I think there's an omen/rule. What's the group's safe protocol for it? If it breaks cohesion, we revise.
communication_matrix_8x8.R2_R4: Treat this as hypothesis. Convert to prediction: if true, we'll see Y by T. If not, downgrade.
communication_matrix_8x8.R2_R5: This symbol matters to me. Can we hold its meaning while ensuring no harm/pressure on others?
communication_matrix_8x8.R2_R6: Run instrument rule: we don't argue metaphysics. We test whether this practice increases stability/ethics.
communication_matrix_8x8.R2_R7: I'm sensing a pattern across life. Help me ground it into stewardship behavior (not certainty claims).
communication_matrix_8x8.R2_R8: Hold it lightly: one bounded practice, one observable effect, one review date. No identity attachment.
communication_matrix_8x8.R3_R1: We stabilize first. Here's the rule: do X now. Then report safety status.
communication_matrix_8x8.R3_R2: Keep the symbol if it strengthens cohesion. If it fuels fear/purity spirals, it's out or sandboxed.
communication_matrix_8x8.R3_R3: Here's the line and the duty. If you disagree, propose a rule replacement + enforcement plan.
communication_matrix_8x8.R3_R4: If this rule matters, define its purpose and metrics. If it doesn't work, we replace it.
communication_matrix_8x8.R3_R5: We keep cohesion and reduce harm. Name the harmed group, propose a reversible reform trial.
communication_matrix_8x8.R3_R6: Set a charter: constraints + enforcement + review cadence. If no charter, no change.
communication_matrix_8x8.R3_R7: Protect the system long-term: reforms must improve stability across time, not just today's victory.
communication_matrix_8x8.R3_R8: Commit cleanly: one rule for now, one review date. No identity warfare.
communication_matrix_8x8.R4_R1: Immediate stabilization: one action, one measurement, one check-in time. No extra variables.
communication_matrix_8x8.R4_R2: Translate symbol to test: what changes if we do it? If nothing changes, treat as aesthetic only.
communication_matrix_8x8.R4_R3: If the rule matters, define objective + enforcement cost. If cost > benefit, redesign.
communication_matrix_8x8.R4_R4: Hypothesis → metric → experiment → iterate. If we can't measure, define proxy.
communication_matrix_8x8.R4_R5: Treat lived experience as impact data. Define harm constraints, then optimize inside them.
communication_matrix_8x8.R4_R6: Agree on frame + constraints first, then optimize locally. If frame shifts, stop and re-charter.
communication_matrix_8x8.R4_R7: Run a scale sweep: local gain must not violate long-horizon viability.
communication_matrix_8x8.R4_R8: Provisional model, decisive action. If results diverge, reconfigure without ego defense.
communication_matrix_8x8.R5_R1: We reduce harm immediately: food/water/rest/safety. Then we talk meaning.
communication_matrix_8x8.R5_R2: We can honor meaning without coercion. Symbols are optional; consent is mandatory.
communication_matrix_8x8.R5_R3: Cohesion matters; harm matters. Pilot reform: keep order metric + harm metric, review date.
communication_matrix_8x8.R5_R4: Your model is missing human constraints. Add dignity/consent/sustainability and retest.
communication_matrix_8x8.R5_R5: Name impacts, name needs, agree on boundaries, then co-create next step.
communication_matrix_8x8.R5_R6: Pluralism needs a charter: tradeoffs, tie-break, mitigation owners, review date.
communication_matrix_8x8.R5_R7: Care must scale: choose actions that reduce suffering now and improve long-run health.
communication_matrix_8x8.R5_R8: Hold lightly, act cleanly: one bounded commitment that reduces harm; reassess without blame.
communication_matrix_8x8.R6_R1: Stabilize body first; then we govern. One constraint loop now, review in 1 hour.
communication_matrix_8x8.R6_R2: Myth mode allowed as instrument. We test effects; no sealed metaphysics.
communication_matrix_8x8.R6_R3: We keep cohesion via explicit rules + revision protocol. Disagreement isn't betrayal; it's governance.
communication_matrix_8x8.R6_R4: Optimize within constraints. If optimization threatens constraints, governance overrides.
communication_matrix_8x8.R6_R5: We publish tradeoffs and name cost-bearers. Consent/mitigation become explicit.
communication_matrix_8x8.R6_R6: Declare frame, constraints, tie-breaks, stop rules. Ship and review.
communication_matrix_8x8.R6_R7: We enforce coherence across scales: short-term wins can't violate long-term viability.
communication_matrix_8x8.R6_R8: Choose, commit, release: governance without clinging. Reconfigure when evidence shifts.
communication_matrix_8x8.R7_R1: Ground in body and environment. One stabilizing action now; no abstraction until stable.
communication_matrix_8x8.R7_R2: Keep symbols as stewardship instruments only if they increase ethics/stability.
communication_matrix_8x8.R7_R3: Order must serve life. Rules are evaluated by whether they reduce suffering across time.
communication_matrix_8x8.R7_R4: Models must include ecology/relational impacts. Add scale constraints or the model is incomplete.
communication_matrix_8x8.R7_R5: Compassion with boundaries: care that sustains the caregiver and the system.
communication_matrix_8x8.R7_R6: Charter must include scale sweep + long-horizon constraints.
communication_matrix_8x8.R7_R7: Align micro-actions with macro-coherence; verify impact; correct drift.
communication_matrix_8x8.R7_R8: Hold wholeness lightly: act, learn, reconfigure without savior narratives.
communication_matrix_8x8.R8_R1: One clean action now; no story. Reassess after the action.
communication_matrix_8x8.R8_R2: Treat meaning as optional instrument. Bounded trial, clear stop rule.
communication_matrix_8x8.R8_R3: No identity wars. One rule now, one review date. If it fails, change without shame.
communication_matrix_8x8.R8_R4: Model is provisional. Act on best current estimate; update fast when data shifts.
communication_matrix_8x8.R8_R5: Care without paralysis: pick the least-harm action that's reversible and do it.
communication_matrix_8x8.R8_R6: Govern lightly: minimal charter, maximal autonomy, strict stop rules.
communication_matrix_8x8.R8_R7: Serve coherence without clinging: local action loop + accountability.

DRILL_001_sealed_claim.trigger: can't be tested / beyond disproof / patterns don't lie
DRILL_001_sealed_claim.experiment: write 1 prediction with deadline + disconfirmers; log outcome
DRILL_001_sealed_claim.stop_rule: if no disconfirmers can be stated, downgrade to meaning-only
DRILL_001_sealed_claim.done: you can state disconfirmers without identity threat

DRILL_002_betrayal_purity.trigger: traitor / real ones / impure / crossed the line
DRILL_002_betrayal_purity.counter_move: separate person from protocol; replace moral claim with rule proposal
DRILL_002_betrayal_purity.experiment: reversible rule trial: cohesion metric + harm metric + review date
DRILL_002_betrayal_purity.stop_rule: if shame language continues, pause decision; re-enter with mediator script

DRILL_003_value_deletion.trigger: only metrics matter / if it can't be measured it's not real
DRILL_003_value_deletion.experiment: re-run same optimization with constraints; compare outcomes
DRILL_003_value_deletion.stop_rule: if constraints can't be represented, declare model incomplete
DRILL_003_value_deletion.done: metrics exist inside values, not instead of values

DRILL_004_relativism_swamp.trigger: all perspectives equal / nobody can be wrong + no decisions
DRILL_004_relativism_swamp.stop_rule: if no tie-break accepted, leadership assigns one temporarily
DRILL_004_relativism_swamp.done: pluralism produces action + review, not stasis

DRILL_005_infinite_framing.counter_move: stop rule first: 'decide by T' + 'review on D'
DRILL_005_infinite_framing.experiment: choose frame; run smallest reversible action; measure
DRILL_005_infinite_framing.stop_rule: if frame changes mid-trial, terminate trial and log why
DRILL_005_infinite_framing.done: frame work results in bounded commitments

DRILL_006_bypass_grand_holism.experiment: local action loop (one measurable service act) + accountability check
DRILL_006_bypass_grand_holism.stop_rule: if boundaries are violated, reduce scope and add enforcement

DRILL_007_quietism_meaning_collapse.counter_move: action requirement: one bounded commitment in 24h
DRILL_007_quietism_meaning_collapse.experiment: commit+release drill: act → log result → release narrative
DRILL_007_quietism_meaning_collapse.stop_rule: if you avoid action 3 days straight, drop to Ring 1 stabilizers + routine

R4_exit.to: models are tools; values pick tools

R6_exit.lcd: identity de-centering: own value system becomes object

R7_exit.lcd: nonattachment to any single coherence state

event_types.evez.ring.classified.v1: turn_id, speaker, ring_primary, ring_secondary, shadow_flags[], confidence, evidence_quotes[]

isolation_rule: scorer role MUST NOT read ring/coincidence ledgers. ring_protocols output = IDs + minimal evidence quotes only. Bus stays lean.
